message:
docs: Update README for v3.0.0 release

- Update version badges and install URLs to 3.0.0
- Document new v3.0 behavior (preserve original bytes by default)
- Add --optimize and --convert flag documentation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@

- + @@ -27,7 +27,7 @@

```bash -curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/get_icloud_image_link/main/install.sh?v=2.1.0" | bash +curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/get_icloud_image_link/main/install.sh?v=3.0.0" | bash ```

@@ -184,12 +184,12 @@ EXIF-aware datetime stamping: -### Optimized Compression -MozJPEG for superior file sizes: -- Configurable quality (1-100) -- 40-50% smaller than originals -- 4:2:0 chroma subsampling -- Preserves visual quality +### Image Processing +v3.0+ preserves original bytes by default: +- `--optimize` for MozJPEG compression +- `--convert` for format conversion +- Quality configurable (1-100) +- HEIC auto-conversion supported @@ -203,7 +203,7 @@ MozJPEG for superior file sizes: **One-liner (recommended):** ```bash -curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/get_icloud_image_link/main/install.sh?v=2.1.0" | bash +curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/get_icloud_image_link/main/install.sh?v=3.0.0" | bash ```
@@ -258,7 +258,9 @@ giil [options] | Flag | Default | Description | |------|---------|-------------| | `--output DIR` | `.` | Output directory for saved images | -| `--quality N` | `85` | JPEG quality (1-100) | +| `--optimize` | off | Apply MozJPEG optimization (opt-in compression) | +| `--convert FMT` | — | Convert to format: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp` | +| `--quality N` | `85` | JPEG/WebP quality 1-100 (with `--optimize` or `--convert`) | | `--base64` | off | Output base64 to stdout instead of saving file | | `--json` | off | Output JSON metadata (path, datetime, dimensions, method) | | `--all` | off | Download all photos from a shared album | @@ -268,6 +270,9 @@ giil [options] | `--version` | — | Print version and exit | | `--help` | — | Show help message | +> **v3.0 Behavior Change:** Original image bytes are now preserved by default (no recompression). +> Use `--optimize` for MozJPEG compression or `--convert` for format conversion. + ### Supported URL Formats Both formats are automatically detected and normalized: @@ -476,7 +481,7 @@ giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/XXX" --all --output ~/album 6. **Image Processing** - Extracts EXIF datetime for filename - Converts HEIC/HEIF if necessary - - Compresses with MozJPEG + - Preserves original bytes (v3.0+) or compresses with `--optimize` 7. **Output Generation** - Writes file to disk (or base64 to stdout) @@ -689,9 +694,22 @@ sudo apt-get install libheif-examples # Debian/Ubuntu sudo dnf install libheif-tools # Fedora ``` -### MozJPEG Compression +### MozJPEG Compression (Opt-in) + +**v3.0+:** By default, giil preserves the original image bytes without recompression. Use `--optimize` to enable MozJPEG compression: + +```bash +# Preserve original bytes (default) +giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/..." + +# Apply MozJPEG optimization +giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/..." --optimize + +# Convert to WebP format +giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/..." --convert webp +``` -giil uses Sharp with MozJPEG for superior compression: +When `--optimize` is used, Sharp applies MozJPEG: ```javascript sharp(buffer).jpeg({ @@ -701,7 +719,7 @@ sharp(buffer).jpeg({ }) ``` -**Compression characteristics:** +**Compression characteristics (with --optimize):** - **40-50% smaller** than standard JPEG at equivalent quality - **4:2:0 chroma subsampling** reduces color data (imperceptible to human eye) - **Quality 85** provides excellent visual quality with significant size reduction
